task:
/home/user/Documents/compared.ply and /home/user/Documents/reference.ply are ASCII PLYs with 1000 points each; reference.ply is the same planar patch as compared.ply shifted by +2 units along Z.

Compute per-point cloud-to-cloud (C2C) distances from compared.ply (compared) to reference.ply (reference) with default settings, attaching the resulting per-point distances as a scalar field on compared.ply. Export the compared cloud with its scalar field as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/compared_c2c.ply. The exported file must include an extra scalar (distance) property per vertex beyond x,y,z, and the 1000-point count must be preserved.

verification.description: Scalar field property present beyond x,y,z
